errors.GroupFull: This group has reached its maximum member count. Try a smaller group or wait for a future group.
errors.GroupAlreadyStarted: This group has already started. Create a new group or choose one that is still forming.
errors.MemberNotInvited: This wallet is not invited to the group. Check the invite address or ask the creator to invite you.
errors.InvalidMemberCount: The member count is outside the supported range. Choose a group size between the configured minimum and maximum.
errors.MintNotSupported: This token mint is not supported for the group. Select a supported mint before creating or joining.
errors.GroupCancelled: This group has been cancelled. Wait for the creator to form a new group or select another active invite.
errors.AlreadyAccepted: This invite has already been accepted. Continue with the existing member position instead of retrying.
